title: ConvergenceJudgment
description: Judgment on whether a debate round added meaningfully new claims compared to the cumulative claim set from prior rounds.

converged.description: True when this round's claims are mostly paraphrases or specializations of claims from prior rounds. False when this round introduced substantively new arguments, objections, or evidence.

novelClaimCount.description: Count of claims in this round that are not paraphrases of prior claims.

totalClaimCount.description: Total count of claims in this round across all peers.

rationale.description: One or two sentences explaining the call. Cite specific claims that are new (or that are restatements) where possible.
